const fs = require\('fs'\);
const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/data/destinations.json', 'utf-8'\)\);

    itinerary: ['鶴ヶ城','さざえ堂','飯盛山','大内宿']
  }
};

let updatedCount = 0;
for \(const item of data\) {
  if \(updates[item.id]\) {
    item.nearby = updates[item.id].nearby;
    item.itinerary = updates[item.id].itinerary;
    updatedCount++;
  }
}
console.log\('Updated:', updatedCount, 'cities'\);

Bash(node -e "const g=require\(''./src/data/transportGraph.json''\); const ids=[''miyako-iwate'',''sanriku'',''kamaishi'',''ofunato'',''kuji'',''suzu'']; ids.forEach\(id=>{const n=g.nodes[''destination:''+id]; const s=g.nodes[''station:''+id]; console.log\(id,''dest:'',\(n?''YES'':''NO''\),''station:'',\(s?''YES'':''NO''\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const g=require\(''./src/data/transportGraph.json''\); const ns=[''hub:釜石'',''hub:大船渡'',''hub:久慈'',''hub:珠洲'',''hub:宮古'']; ns.forEach\(n=>{const e=g.edges.filter\(x=>x.from===n||x.to===n\); console.log\(n,''edges:'',e.length, g.nodes[n]?''node:Y'':''node:N''\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const g=require\(''./src/data/transportGraph.json''\); const hubs=Object.keys\(g.nodes\).filter\(k=>k.startsWith\(''hub:''\)\); const edges=g.edges.filter\(e=>e.from===''hub:仙台''||e.from===''hub:盛岡''\); console.log\(''from仙台:'', edges.filter\(e=>e.from===''hub:仙台''\).map\(e=>e.to+''\(''+e.type+''\)''\).join\('',''\)\); console.log\(''from盛岡:'', edges.filter\(e=>e.from===''hub:盛岡''\).map\(e=>e.to+''\(''+e.type+''\)''\).join\('',''\)\);")
